title: lagarinthus galpinii
intro: Lagarinthus galpinii, also known as the 'Milk Bush' or 'White Milk Bush', is a plant species belonging to the family Pedaliaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lagarinthus galpinii include treating eczema, acne, and other skin irritations, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including creams, ointments, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
